_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids.
_publications._context: We used a 3D rBM overlay model according to previous publications for live-cell imaging by confocal microscopy

basicInfo.description: 3D reconstituted basement membrane (rBM) overlay culture system for plexiform neurofibroma cells; used to study fibroblast-driven tumor growth and invasiveness via live-cell confocal microscopy
